Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Anne C. Gritzer, Esq. of Walsworth Franklin Bevins & McCall LLP, (415-781-7072), for SF Housing Authority, Defendant and moving party.
Mary Catherine Wiederhold, Esq., Attorney at Law, (415-533-0735), for Calvin Bolton, Plaintiff and opposing party.

Counsel reports in open court that there is no agreement as to the form of order re protective order. Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's Motion For Protective Order is GRANTED. Prevailing party submits proposed order and opposing party raises its objection to the proposed order in open court. Judge Ronald Quidachay, Clerk: M. Olopernes, Not reported (D501)
